/openapi/indonesia-expedition-cost.yaml</span></a></hgroup><div class="description"><div class="renderedMarkdown"><p>Complete API collection for shipping cost calculation between Indonesian villages.</p>
<h2>Features</h2>
<ul>
<li>Calculate shipping costs between villages</li>
<li>Multiple courier options (JNE, SiCepat, SAP, etc.)</li>
<li>Automatic caching for faster responses</li>
<li>Weight-based pricing</li>
<li>Delivery time estimation</li>
<li>Zero-price courier filtering</li>
</ul>
<h2>Authentication</h2>
<p>All requests require an API key in the <code>x-api-co-id</code> header.</p>
<h2>Base URL</h2>
<p><code>https://use.api.co.id/expedition</code></p>
<h2>Village Codes</h2>
<p>Village codes can be found using the <a href="https://api.co.id/indonesia-regional-api/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Api Regional Wilayah Indonesia</a>. Use the <code>/regional/indonesia/villages</code> endpoint to search for villages and get their 10-digit codes.</p>
<h2>Requirements</h2>
<ul>
<li>Weight must be greater than 0</li>
